name: Entity Board
description: Home Assistant entity states as rows on the split-flap wall

settings.label: Entities
settings.note: Pick the Home Assistant entities to show. In the add-on this works automatically; standalone Docker needs COMPANION_HA_URL + COMPANION_HA_TOKEN set.

settings.label: Rename / thresholds
settings.note: One entity per line: entity_id | Name | low,high. Name and thresholds are optional. A numeric value is green below low, amber between, red above high. Lines here can also add entities.
